items.reason: The legacy one-dimensional waterfall grammar supports both the fixed single-dimension total variance view and the variable-dimension root-cause total bridge. The plugin exposes them as separate capabilities so reporting can distinguish a light dimension split from root-cause source data.

The plugin-native total_by_dimension_bridge aggregates the standard variance result by one selected dimension and renders the legacy-style initial/final value bars and percent pins without launching variable-dimension root-cause analysis.
Small multiples are represented as a panel parameter of the scenario bridge capability, not a separate capability.
